Annotation Interface CommandInfo

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) public @interface CommandInfo
Annotation for command metadata. Used to specify command name, description, aliases, and permission requirement.

  • Required Element Summary

    Required Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    String
    name
    Command name.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String[]
    aliases
    Command aliases.
    String
    description
    Command description.
    String
    permission
    Specific permission node required to execute the command.
    MagicPermissionDefault
    permissionDefault
    Default permission state (matches Bukkit PermissionDefault).
    CommandThreading
    threading
    Threading policy for command execution.

  • Element Details

    • name

      String name
      Command name.
      Returns:
      the name of the command

    • description

      String description
      Command description.
      Returns:
      the description of the command
      Default:
      ""

    • aliases

      String[] aliases
      Command aliases.
      Returns:
      the aliases for the command
      Default:
      {}

    • permission

      String permission
      Specific permission node required to execute the command. If empty, no check is performed.
      Returns:
      permission node
      Default:
      ""

    • permissionDefault

      MagicPermissionDefault permissionDefault
      Default permission state (matches Bukkit PermissionDefault).
      Returns:
      default permission
      Default:
      OP

    • threading

      CommandThreading threading
      Threading policy for command execution.
      Returns:
      threading policy
      Default:
      MAIN
